body_tmpl: Hi, I am writing to renew our annual business license for {BIZ} located at {ADDRESS}. Our current license expires on {DATE}. I have attached the completed renewal form along with our certificate of insurance. Please let me know if there is anything else you need from us or if we owe a different fee than last year's {AMOUNT}. Best, {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for submitting your renewal for {BIZ}. Your application is under review and you will receive the updated license within {DAYS} business days once payment of {AMOUNT} is confirmed. Please call our office at {PHONE} with any questions.

body_tmpl: Good morning. {BIZ} is planning to install a new wall-mounted sign at our location, {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. The proposed sign is {NUM} square feet and will be illuminated. I have attached the sign drawings and site plan. Could you please confirm the permit fee and estimated review timeline? We'd like to be ready before our grand reopening on {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: License Hold – Pending Zoning Clearance for {BIZ}
body_tmpl: Rosa, I have a new business license application from {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} that is on hold pending zoning clearance from your office. The applicant, {FIRST} {LAST}, wants to open a retail use in what may still be classified as a light-industrial bay. Can you confirm whether the use is permitted and send me the clearance so I can issue the license? Application case is {CASE}.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I pulled the parcel records. The retail use is conditionally permitted in that zone — I will issue the zoning clearance today and copy you. License can proceed once you receive it.

subject_tmpl: New Business Opening – License Questions for {BIZ}
body_tmpl: Hello, my name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I am opening {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. This will be a small boutique selling handmade goods. I have a few questions: (1) What licenses are required for a retail operation? (2) Is a food handler's permit needed if we serve complimentary coffee to customers? (3) What is the estimated wait time for initial approval? I can be reached at {PHONE}. Thank you.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, welcome to Bellwood! For a retail boutique you will need a general business license ({AMOUNT} annually). Serving complimentary coffee may also require a food service registration — I will copy our health officer for guidance. Standard review is {DAYS} business days. Stop by Village Hall or call {PHONE} to get started.

body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here on behalf of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. We'd like to set up an outdoor seating area with {NUM} tables along the {STREET} sidewalk this season. I understand we need a sidewalk café permit and possibly a revocable license agreement. Can you send us the application packet? We plan to open the patio by {DATE} and want to make sure we are in full compliance.
reply_tmpl: I am emailing you the outdoor seating application packet and fee schedule. The permit requires a site plan showing table placement, aisle clearance of at least 5 feet, and proof of liability insurance naming the Village. Fee is {AMOUNT}. Once we receive the complete packet we can schedule an inspection within {DAYS} days.

body_tmpl: This is {FIRST} {LAST}, manager of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. We received our inspection report dated {DATE} with {NUM} violations cited under case {CASE}. We have corrected all items and would like to schedule a re-inspection at your earliest convenience. We have documented the corrections with photos which I can email over. Please advise on next steps and any re-inspection fee.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the update, {FIRST}. Please send photos to this email and I will review before scheduling the re-inspection. If the documentation is satisfactory I can book a site visit within {DAYS} days. Re-inspection fee is {AMOUNT}.

body_tmpl: Yolanda, the sign permit for {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} has been approved under permit number {CASE}. The {NUM}-square-foot wall sign meets village code. Please update the business record and note that a final inspection is required after installation. Installation must be complete by {DATE} or the permit will need to be renewed. Fee of {AMOUNT} was collected.

subject_tmpl: Thank You – Support During Our Grand Opening on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I wanted to take a moment to thank you and your staff for the warm welcome when we opened {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. The licensing process was smoother than expected, and Yolanda's team was incredibly helpful at every step. The ribbon-cutting on {DATE} was a wonderful community moment. We look forward to being a positive part of the Bellwood business community for years to come. Warmly, {FIRST} {LAST}

Mayor Okonkwo, attached is the monthly new and renewed business license report through {DATE}. Highlights: {NUM} new licenses issued this month, {NUM} renewals processed, and {NUM} applications pending zoning review. Total license revenue collected this period is {AMOUNT}. Notable new openings include businesses on {STREET} and {CROSS}. Let me know if you'd like a briefing before the next council meeting.

Yolanda, during a routine sweep on {STREET} I found {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} operating without a current business license. Our records show the license expired on {DATE} and no renewal has been filed. I have issued a notice of violation under case {CASE} giving them {DAYS} days to come into compliance. Please flag this account and let me know if they contact you to renew.
reply_tmpl: Sandra, I have flagged the account. If they renew within the {DAYS}-day window they will owe the standard fee of {AMOUNT} plus the late penalty. I will update you as soon as they come in.

body_tmpl: Hi there. We are considering placing a freestanding monument sign near the entrance of our property at {ADDRESS}. We want to make sure we are within setback requirements along {STREET} before we commission drawings. Could you tell us the maximum allowed height and square footage for a freestanding sign in a commercial corridor, and what the permit application requires? Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}, {BIZ}.

subject_tmpl: Change of Ownership – License Transfer for {BIZ}
body_tmpl: To the Village Clerk's office: I am {FIRST} {LAST}, the new owner of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} as of {DATE}. I am told an existing business license cannot simply be transferred and that I need to apply fresh. I have completed the new-license application and enclosed proof of purchase and my state sales tax number. Is there anything else required? I'd like to open as quickly as possible.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for reaching out. You are correct that licenses are non-transferable. Your packet looks complete — we just need a copy of your liability insurance naming the Village. Once received we can process within {DAYS} business days. Fee is {AMOUNT}.

body_tmpl: Yolanda, I conducted a routine check at {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} on {DATE} and confirmed they are preparing food for sale without a food service registration on file. I advised the owner, {FIRST} {LAST}, to register immediately. Can you send them the food service registration packet? They seem eager to comply. I will follow up with an initial inspection once the registration is submitted.

Hello, {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} is planning to install vinyl graphics covering roughly {NUM}% of our front window for a seasonal promotion. I was told this might require a sign permit. Could you confirm whether a permit is required and, if so, what the fee is? The graphics would go up around {DATE} and come down {DAYS} days later. Thank you, {FIRST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, temporary window graphics covering more than 25% of glass area do require a sign permit in Bellwood. The fee is {AMOUNT}. Applications can be submitted online or in person. Approval typically takes {DAYS} business days. Temporary signs are limited to 30-day display periods per code.

body_tmpl: Dear Finance Department, I am submitting payment for the annual license fee for {BIZ}, account {ACCT}. The amount due of {AMOUNT} is enclosed as a check. Please apply it to our renewal and send a receipt to {FIRST} {LAST} at {ADDRESS}. If there is a balance due from a prior period or a late fee I am unaware of, please contact me at {PHONE} before depositing.

subject_tmpl: FYI: Large Retailer Interest in {STREET} Corridor
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I wanted to flag that a representative from a regional retail chain contacted me about a potential location at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. They are asking about zoning, available incentives, and our licensing timeline. I've asked Rosa and Yolanda to pull the relevant information and I will arrange a meeting for {DATE} at {TIME}. Wanted you to be aware given the economic development angle. I'll brief you beforehand.

Hi, I'm {FIRST} {LAST} and I live near {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. There appears to be a commercial operation running out of a residential garage — I see delivery trucks multiple times a day and customers coming and going. It's causing parking problems on our block. Can you look into whether they have the proper licensing or zoning approvals? This has been going on since at least {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for bringing this to our attention, {FIRST}. I have opened case {CASE} and will inspect the property at {ADDRESS} within {DAYS} business days. We take zoning and licensing compliance seriously. I'll follow up once we've made contact.

body_tmpl: To Whom It May Concern: I am {FIRST} {LAST}, owner of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. I understand our license renewal was due on {DATE} and we missed the deadline. This was due to a billing change — the renewal notice went to an old address. We are ready to pay the renewal fee of {AMOUNT} plus any applicable late fee. I am asking that the late penalty be waived given the circumstances. Please advise.

Sandra, I received a complaint about an unpermitted sign installed at {BIZ}, {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. I drove by and confirmed a new pylon sign was erected without a permit. The sign appears to be approximately {NUM} square feet. Please issue a stop-work notice and direct the owner to apply for the proper permit. Case {CASE} has been opened in our system.
reply_tmpl: Rosa, I issued the notice this afternoon and spoke with the owner. They were unaware a permit was required. I directed them to your office to file the application. They said they'd come in by {DATE}.

body_tmpl: Hello, I would like to apply for a home occupation license to run a small consulting practice from my residence at {ADDRESS}. There would be no clients visiting the property, no employees on-site, and no exterior signage. Business name would be {BIZ}. Could you let me know what application materials are needed and what the annual fee is? I am also wondering if there are any restrictions I should be aware of. Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, home occupations that meet our criteria — no customer visits, no employees, no exterior signage — are permitted with a home occupation license at {AMOUNT} per year. I'll email you the one-page application. Once submitted we can approve within {DAYS} business days.

subject_tmpl: New Restaurant License App – Inspection Requested for {BIZ}
body_tmpl: Priya, we have a new business license application for {BIZ}, a full-service restaurant at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Applicant is {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}. Before I can issue the license, I need a health department approval. Can you schedule the initial food service inspection? Applicant says the kitchen is fully built out and ready. Hoping we can move quickly — they are targeting a {DATE} opening.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I will contact {FIRST} today to set up the inspection. Earliest I can get there is {DATE}. I will send you the approval or punch list within {DAYS} days of the visit.

body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I am {FIRST} {LAST}, owner of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. I submitted our license renewal {DAYS} days ago and have not received any confirmation or the renewed certificate. We are technically in limbo and I worry about liability. I have tried calling the clerk's office twice. I appreciate your leadership and I hope you can help expedite this. Our renewal case number is {CASE}. Thank you for your attention.

Yolanda, the mayor received a message from {FIRST} {LAST} at {BIZ} regarding a delayed license renewal, case {CASE}. They say the application was submitted {DAYS} days ago with no update. Could you look into the status and either contact the applicant directly at {PHONE} or send me a note so I can respond on the mayor's behalf? The mayor would like this resolved by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Tina, I found the application — it was in a queue waiting for a health clearance from Priya's office. I just got the clearance and will issue the certificate today. I'll call {FIRST} directly to apologize for the delay.

body_tmpl: Rosa, we already have an approved outdoor seating permit for {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} covering {NUM} tables. We'd like to add {NUM} more tables for the summer season. Does the existing permit need to be amended or do we file a new application? If there is a fee difference, please let us know the amount. We are targeting {DATE} to have the expanded seating ready. Thanks, {FIRST} {LAST}.

Hi, I am interested in operating a seasonal outdoor vendor stall near {STREET} and {CROSS} during the summer months. My business, {BIZ}, sells handcrafted items. Do I need a temporary vendor license, and what are the location restrictions? I would be operating on {DAYS} days per week from {TIME} to roughly 6 p.m. Any guidance you can offer would be appreciated. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Referral – Suspected Food Safety Concern at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Priya, while inspecting a signage complaint at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} I noticed conditions in the prep area that concern me from a food safety standpoint — I saw evidence of pest activity and improper storage. The business is {BIZ}, licensed under case {CASE}. I didn't have authority to cite for food code violations but wanted to get this in front of you immediately. Can you schedule an inspection in the next {DAYS} days?
reply_tmpl: Sandra, thank you for the heads-up. I'm flagging this as a priority and will get there by {DATE}. If conditions are as you describe I will issue a corrective action order on the spot.

body_tmpl: To the Village Clerk, this letter is to formally notify the Village of Bellwood that {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} will permanently close effective {DATE}. We ask that our business license be cancelled on that date. Please confirm receipt and advise whether any pro-rated refund is available for the unused portion of this year's license fee. Our license account number is {ACCT}. Thank you for your assistance over the years. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the notice, {FIRST}. We will cancel the license for {BIZ} effective {DATE}. Per village ordinance, license fees are non-refundable. I will update our records and send you a written confirmation. Best wishes going forward.

subject_tmpl: Engineering Review Needed – Large Sign Foundation at {STREET}
body_tmpl: Tom, I have a sign permit application for a monument sign at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. The proposed structure is {NUM} feet tall with a concrete footing. Before I can approve it, I need your sign-off that the foundation design meets our standards given the soil conditions along that corridor. I've attached the structural drawings. Can you review and respond by {DATE}? Applicant is {BIZ} and they are eager to move.

Hello, I am a commercial insurance underwriter with {NAME} Insurance. We are preparing a policy for {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} in Bellwood and need to verify that a current business license is on file with the Village. Could you confirm the license is active, the expiration date, and the license type? Please reply to this email or call {PHONE}. We appreciate your assistance.
reply_tmpl: We can confirm that {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} holds an active {DEPT} business license expiring {DATE}. If you need an official written verification letter there is a {AMOUNT} fee. Please let us know how you'd like to proceed.

body_tmpl: Yolanda, as part of the end-of-quarter reconciliation I need the complete license fee collections report through {DATE}. Finance shows {AMOUNT} received but our GL coding shows a discrepancy of approximately {AMOUNT} compared to your office's log. Can you pull your receipts for the quarter and send them over so we can reconcile before the council packet goes out on {DATE}? Thank you.

Good afternoon, I am {FIRST} {LAST}, manager of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. Our liquor license is due for annual renewal by {DATE}. I want to make sure I have all documents ready this time. Last year we had a delay because our certificate of good standing from the state was not in order. Could you send me the full checklist of required documents and the renewal fee schedule? I prefer to be early. Thank you.

subject_tmpl: Banner Sign Permit for Grand Opening – {BIZ} on {STREET}
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} of {BIZ} here. We are planning a grand opening event at {ADDRESS} and would like to display a horizontal banner across the building facade for {DAYS} days beginning {DATE}. The banner would be approximately {NUM} feet wide. Do we need a temporary sign permit for this, and is there anything that might prevent approval along {STREET}? We want to make sure everything is by the book.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, a temporary banner permit is required. Fee is {AMOUNT} for up to 30 days. Submit the application with the banner dimensions, installation method, and proposed dates. Given the {STREET} location, please also confirm it won't obstruct any sight lines at the intersection. We can usually approve these in {DAYS} business days.

subject_tmpl: Memo: Lapsed License List for Council – {DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, for the council packet due {DATE} I have prepared the semi-annual lapsed business license report. As of today, {NUM} businesses have licenses more than {DAYS} days past expiration. Code enforcement has been notified on all accounts. The combined outstanding renewal revenue is approximately {AMOUNT}. I recommend the council authorize code officers to begin formal citation proceedings for any business still unlicensed after {DATE}. Please advise if you'd like to discuss before the meeting.

Hi, {BIZ} is relocating from {ADDRESS} to a new location at {NUM} {STREET}, effective {DATE}. Could you update our business license to reflect the new address? I understand an inspection of the new location may be required before the license can be transferred. Please let me know what I need to do and whether there is a fee for the address change. My contact number is {PHONE}. Thanks, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, address changes on an active license do require a site inspection at the new location. Please complete the change-of-location form (available at Village Hall or on our website) and pay the {AMOUNT} administrative fee. Once we receive the form and fee we'll schedule an inspection within {DAYS} business days.

subject_tmpl: Weekend Business License Sweep – {STREET} Corridor Summary
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I completed a compliance sweep of the {STREET} commercial corridor on {DATE}. Of {NUM} businesses checked, {NUM} were fully licensed, {NUM} had expired licenses, and {NUM} could not produce any license documentation. Notices of violation were issued to {NUM} businesses. The most common issue was failure to renew after expiration. I am coordinating with Yolanda's office on follow-up. A full written report will be in your inbox by {DATE}.
